memory_note: Apple Silicon uses unified memory (shared CPU/GPU pool), not discrete VRAM
gpu_utilization_note: macOS does not expose per-process GPU utilization via torch/MPS. Run alongside: sudo powermetrics --samplers gpu_power -i 1000 -n 5 during inference to read GPU active residency % manually.
cost_methodology_note: Estimated from assumed 12.0W sustained draw x measured mean latency, at $0.15/kWh. Not measured directly — M3 Air has no per-process power sensor exposed to userland. For rigor, measure via 'sudo powermetrics' during a sustained inference loop and substitute the real wattage here.
